canonical_definition: Geospatial Dataset Extraction task in the CURIE benchmark where the model must identify all datasets used in a research paper, including their sources, variables, and time/spatial ranges.
papers: CURIE: Evaluating LLMs on Multitask Scientific Long-Context Understanding and Reasoning
G-LLaVA: Solving Geometric Problem with Multi-Modal Large Language Model

definitions.text: A dataset for geometry problem solving, included as a subtask within the MathVista benchmark.
